name: cold-start-selector
description: Lightweight selector for Gomoku cold-start campaigns. Recommends next points, seed rechecks, and branch continuations based on frontier gaps, uncertainty, and dominance.

new_point.description: Sample a new configuration point in the search space, preferring frontier-adjacent sparse regions.

seed_recheck.description: Re-run an existing high-variance or single-seed candidate with a different seed to verify stability.

continue_branch.description: Continue training from a promising parent checkpoint with a branch reason delta (e.g. lr_decay, mcts_upshift).

eval_upgrade.description: Upgrade evaluation benchmark for a candidate that has plateaued at its current eval_level.

skip_dominated.description: Explicitly mark dominated regions so the selector does not waste budget there.
